text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In dem Brandmüllerischen Buchladen wird ein <BIBL><TITLE>Project von <AUTHOR>Hiorini</AUTHOR> klugen und verständigen Haus-Vatter, wie auch adelichem Land-Leben</TITLE>, welches durch Sub. scriptionen in <VOLUME>2. Folianten</VOLUME> - <PRIZE>6. fl.</PRIZE> gedrucket wird</BIBL>. Ferner ist allda neu fertig worden: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lutheri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Bibel</TITLE> mit Figuren in <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL>; Item, <BIBL>des Herrn Abbts <AUTHOR>Fleury</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kirchen-Historien</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem französischen ubersetzt</BIBL>; Item, <BIBL><TITLE>die gantze Pflicht des Menschen</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem Englischen ubersetzt</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1. Fixed mismatched </TITLE> tag: the original closed the title prematurely after 'Project', leaving the remainder of the title text untagged. The closing tag was moved to the end of the full title phrase. 2. Added a missing <BIBL> wrapper around the Fleury entry to maintain consistent bibliographic structure across all items. 3. Corrected six instances of mojibake/encoding artifacts (e.g., \\u221a\\u00b -> ü, \\u221a\\u00a7 -> ä) to proper UTF-8 German characters. 4. Replaced a stray encoding artifact between the volume and price elements with a standard hyphen for structural clarity."}

parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed mismatched </TITLE> tag: the original closed the title prematurely after 'Project', leaving the remainder of the title text untagged. The closing tag was moved to the end of the full title phrase. 2. Added a missing <BIBL> wrapper around the Fleury entry to maintain consistent bibliographic structure across all items. 3. Corrected six instances of mojibake/encoding artifacts (e.g., \u221a\u00b -> ü, \u221a\u00a7 -> ä) to proper UTF-8 German characters. 4. Replaced a stray encoding artifact between the volume and price elements with a standard hyphen for structural clarity.
